metadata.objective: Ensure each business (marceau-solutions, swflorida-hvac, shipping-logistics) only sends relevant offers to their target leads, with separate performance tracking

stories.title: Add business_id tracking to all campaign data
stories.description: Update campaign analytics, SMS manager, and follow-up sequences to track which business sent each campaign. Add sending_business_id field to LeadRecord, campaign logs, and analytics reports.
acceptance_criteria: LeadRecord has sending_business_id field (already added)
SMS campaigns log business_id in sms_campaigns.json
Follow-up sequences track business_id per lead
Analytics can filter/group by business_id
History files include business_id in all campaign records

stories.title: Create business-specific template mappings
stories.description: Define which templates each business can use. Marceau Solutions = AI/website templates, HVAC = HVAC service templates, Shipping = logistics templates. Prevent cross-business template usage.
acceptance_criteria: BUSINESS_TEMPLATE_MAP created in constants/config
marceau-solutions: no_website, few_reviews, no_online_transactions templates
swflorida-hvac: HVAC-specific templates (create if needed)
shipping-logistics: shipping/logistics templates (create if needed)
SMS manager validates template matches business_id before sending
Error raised if wrong template used for business

stories.title: Update analytics reports to show per-business performance
stories.description: Add business-level aggregation to campaign_analytics report command. Show separate metrics for each business: response rates, funnel metrics, template performance by business.
acceptance_criteria: python -m src.campaign_analytics report --business marceau-solutions shows only Marceau campaigns
python -m src.campaign_analytics report (no filter) shows all businesses separately
Each business section shows: total contacts, responses, response rate, hot/warm/cold breakdown
Template performance grouped by business
Funnel metrics calculated per business
stories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Review analytics output before proceeding to ensure tracking is working correctly

stories.title: Create HVAC-specific outreach templates
stories.description: Create SMS templates for SW Florida HVAC targeting restaurants, gyms, retail. Focus on HVAC maintenance, energy savings, customer comfort as value props (NOT website building).
acceptance_criteria: templates/sms/optimized/hvac_maintenance.json created
templates/sms/optimized/hvac_energy_savings.json created
Templates mention HVAC services, energy bills, AC maintenance
NO mention of websites, AI automation, or shipping
TCPA compliant with business name 'SW Florida Comfort HVAC'
Expected 8-10% response rate (realistic for HVAC cold outreach)

stories.title: Create shipping/logistics outreach templates
stories.description: Create SMS templates for shipping client targeting e-commerce, retail, wholesale. Focus on shipping costs, fulfillment speed, carrier options as value props (NOT website building or HVAC).
acceptance_criteria: templates/sms/optimized/shipping_cost_savings.json created
templates/sms/optimized/shipping_fulfillment_speed.json created
Templates mention shipping rates, fulfillment, logistics optimization
NO mention of websites, AI automation, or HVAC
TCPA compliant with business name from config
Expected 6-8% response rate (realistic for logistics cold outreach)

tracking_schema.sms_campaigns.json: Add business_id to each campaign record
tracking_schema.outreach_history.json: Track business_id in all campaign entries

validation.before_analytics: Verify business_id present in all records
